series_metadata.series_description: Examination files include statutory examination report, financial statements, paid invoices, annual CU-2 report, and any correspondence relating to a particular credit union.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility twenty (20) years ; Electronic: electronic files twenty (20) years following date of examination
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
